title: Bilingual Voiceover Talent for Quick Service Restaurant Commercial
mainText:
DSCasting
Advertising, PR & Marketing
Bilingual Voiceover Talent for Quick Service Restaurant Commercial
Posted 6 days ago∙Apply by April 16, 2026 at 11:59 PM
Save
Share
Apply externally
At a glance
$294/hr
Hybrid, based in Atlanta, GA
Work in person for part of the week, from the location
Job
Part-time∙2 hours a month∙From April 9, 2026 to April 21, 2026
US work authorization required
Job description

Hello! We are DSCasting and we specialize in documentary-style commercials and projects, mostly with non-actors. 

We're currently working on an exciting PAID commercial for a Quick Service Restaurant and we're looking for BILINGUAL people (English/Spanish) who are fans of two seasonal menu items that will be returning to the menu this summer: a spicy sandwich and a refreshing fruit-infused beverage.  We are also open to people who have not yet tried these items, but would be excited to do so.

Our ideal subjects are groups of two Spanish speakers: one who is a fan of the drink, and the other who is a fan of the sandwich. Participants must be 18 years or older, live in the Atlanta metro area, and can speak about their love for these menu items.

NOTE: This commercial is voiceover only, so those who are selected will have a 2 hour voice recording session in addition to a 30-minute tasting session.

**IMPORTANT - For this project we unfortunately CANNOT use anyone who is an actor, has ever been an actor, or has ever been paid to appear in an on-camera project of any kind. 

Submission Link for additional information for anyone who would like to be considered:  

https://quickserviceatlanta.castingcrane.com/

DETAILS:

WHAT: Commercial for Quick Service Restaurant
WHEN: If selected, you will be invited to try a special, seasonal item in person (either a spicy sandwich or a fruit-infused beverage) on one day between April 9th-14th. You will then be invited to a recording studio to speak about your love of either item on another day between April 15th and 21st.
The tasting session will take roughly 30 minutes
The recording session will be roughly two hours long
WHERE: Atlanta, GA 
COMPENSATION:
$736.12 USD per person for the 30 minute tasting session + the roughly 2 hour long recording session (Voiceover Session)

Casting Questionnaire (you must fill this out in order to be considered): https://quickserviceatlanta.castingcrane.com/


Please note that we're on a pretty quick turnaround, so if you have any questions, contact us ASAP. Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

Thanks so much!!

DSCasting
